the sport stem rake (rakeAt, lines 64-65) only affects u>0.85 and does not move the cockpit sole
_ruled_items: was _confirm: the bow cleat stands on the excluded foredeck — if mooring animations need the character to reach it on foot, the foredeck exclusion needs an owner ruling. RULED: ACCEPTED (owner, 2026-07-22) — the foredeck stays excluded; mooring is the toss-a-line cast verb, the character never needs to stand at the bow cleat.
